title: Ahmad Vahidi: The IRGC commander who is the 'power behind the throne' in Iran
snippet: Since becoming IRGC Commander-in-Chief on March 1, 2026, Ahmad Vahidi has become the dominant figure in Iranian politics, blocking even the president's cabinet appointments. He is described as practically controlling the country.
tag_reason: First major profile identifying Vahidi as the de facto ruler of Iran — new entity and critical power dynamic
